title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Totality Services Ltd
body: "Application number 4553  Applicant Totality Services London Ltd objected to the name used by Totality Services Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 13 June 2024, the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Totality Services Ltd is changed to 15227101, Ltd. "
